summary: Backlog Items 1-5 Testing Complete. Verified: (1) Public profile page exists at /referee/:id but has Firestore permissions issue - requires auth for user reads. Share button works for referees, hidden for managers. (2) All components have typed props. (3) Audit logging implemented with writeAuditLog in firestoreService.ts, wired to login/profile/assignment actions. _audit_log has append-only rule. (4) GDPR: Export Data and Delete Account buttons present in Settings, functions exist in firestoreService.ts. (5) 2FA dialog opens with password→QR→verify→done flow. 29/29 unit tests pass.

integration_issues.issue: Firestore rules require authentication for /users collection reads, but public profile page is designed to work without auth. Error: 'Missing or insufficient permissions'

item_1_public_profile.share_button_referee: PASS - Button visible, copies URL to clipboard
item_1_public_profile.share_button_manager: PASS - Button correctly hidden for managers
item_1_public_profile.firestore_permissions: FAIL - Rules require auth for user reads, public profile cannot load without login
item_1_public_profile.fields_displayed: name, avatar, rating, certifications, games count, experience, bio (when profile loads)
item_1_public_profile.email_phone_hidden: PASS - fetchPublicRefereeProfile excludes email/phone from response

components_verified: SkeletonCard - inline { variant?: string; count?: number }
GameDetailSheet - inline typed props (uses any for game objects)

item_3_audit_logging.firestore_rules: PASS - _audit_log collection has append-only rule (create: if isAuth(); read/update/delete: if false)

item_4_gdpr.double_confirmation: PASS - Settings.tsx lines 106-107 use two window.confirm() calls

ui_test_results.landing_page: PASS - Hero section, features, navigation visible
ui_test_results.login_page: PASS - Email/password fields, Try Demo Account button, demo role selection modal
ui_test_results.dashboard_page: PASS - Welcome message, stats cards, Quick Actions, Activity Feed
ui_test_results.profile_page_referee: PASS - Share Public Profile button, Performance Ratings section, certifications
ui_test_results.profile_page_manager: PASS - No Share button, No Performance Ratings (correctly hidden)
ui_test_results.settings_page: PASS - Notifications, Preferences, Account & Security, Support sections
ui_test_results.settings_account_security: PASS - Change Password, 2FA, Login History, Export Data, Privacy, Delete Account buttons

action_items: CRITICAL: Update firestore.rules to allow unauthenticated reads for public referee profiles. Add rule like: match /users/{userId} { allow read: if isAuth() || (resource.data.role == 'referee'); } or create a separate public_profiles collection
critical_code_review_comments: Public profile Firestore rule needs update - currently requires auth for all user reads, blocking the public profile feature
GameDetailSheet uses 'any' type for game and gameReport props - consider creating proper interfaces

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features work except public profile Firestore permissions)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 backlog items implemented. Public profile page component works but Firestore rules block unauthenticated access. 2FA requires Firebase Identity Platform enabled (may show error if not configured). All other features working. 29/29 unit tests pass.

public_profile_permissions.root_cause: Firestore rules at /app/firestore.rules line 24 require isAuth() for all user document reads
public_profile_permissions.impact: Public referee profile page at /referee/:id cannot fetch user data without authentication
public_profile_permissions.fix_required: Update firestore.rules to allow public read access for referee profiles while protecting sensitive fields
